overall.description: Gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a black sports car driving through a near-future London. The vehicle navigates city streets lined with autumn trees and historic stone buildings, passes under a bridge along the Thames, and approaches Parliament Square with Big Ben visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with historic architecture and autumn foliage

agents.ego_description: accelerating along city street passing bus stops and historic buildings

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying Albion propaganda
multi-story classical stone building with large windows
trees with orange and yellow fall foliage lining the street
glass and metal bus shelter with digital display

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a black sports car driving through an urban London street. A digital billboard and bus stop are visible on the left, while historic stone buildings line the right. Autumn trees with warm-colored leaves create a canopy over the road as the vehicle accelerates through the city.

scene_state.functional_zone: road passing under bridge overpass with temporary shadow

events.description: entering shadow of bridge overpass, lighting dims significantly
exiting underpass back into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: passing through underpass and emerging onto riverside road

notable_agents.action: red double-decker bus driving parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: concrete bridge structure casting shadows over the road
wide river visible through gaps in the trees on the left side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete bridge underpass, causing a dramatic shift to darker, mixed lighting. A classic red London double-decker bus appears on the right. Exiting the underpass, the River Thames becomes visible on the left as the road opens up to the riverside embankment.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside embankment with mixed modern and historic architecture

events.description: passing Scotland Yard building with visible signage on the right

agents.ego_description: cruising along the Thames embankment passing various vehicles and landmarks

notable_agents.action: black London taxi driving in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: large stone building with Scotland Yard signage on the facade
black decorative Victorian-style lamp posts lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving along the open Thames embankment, the scene features the river on the left and a mix of modern and historic buildings on the right. The vehicle passes the Scotland Yard building and ornate street lamps while maintaining a steady speed through moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to Parliament Square with Gothic architecture

events.description: Big Ben and Parliament buildings become visible in the distance ahead
slowing down as traffic congests near Parliament intersection

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop in heavy traffic approaching Parliament Square

notable_agents.action: large black truck stopped ahead at the intersection
white sedan merging into traffic from the left

entered.detail: iconic Gothic clock tower and parliamentary buildings dominating the skyline
orange and white construction barriers along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches Parliament Square with Big Ben and the Gothic Parliament buildings visible ahead. Traffic density increases significantly, forcing the vehicle to slow to a stop behind a large truck. Pedestrians are visible crossing the streets, and construction barriers line the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a black sports car as it journeys from a leafy urban street through a dark underpass and along the river toward the heart of government London. It begins by accelerating through a city road lined with historic stone buildings and a canopy of warm autumn leaves, passing a digital billboard and bus stop. As the vehicle enters a concrete bridge underpass, the lighting shifts dramatically to a darker tone before opening up to the riverside embankment where the River Thames appears on the left. The scene then expands along the open waterfront, gliding past the Scotland Yard building and ornate street lamps amidst moderate traffic. Finally, the camera approaches the Gothic architecture of Parliament Square and Big Ben, where the vehicle slows to a stop behind a large truck amidst dense traffic, pedestrians, and roadside construction barriers.
